### Special Abilities
[{"name":"Flyby","desc":"The owl doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy's reach."},{"name":"Keen Hearing and Sight","desc":"The owl has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or sight."}]

### Actions
